Welcome to our clinic

A multispeciality clinic built on trust & expertise

Trust, communication, honesty, privacy, and patient service are the primary focus of our design. We want you to not only see and hear, but to also feel how much we truly appreciate your visit.

From a child's very first visit to complex implant procedures, every treatment at Dental Avenue Clinic is designed around your comfort and long-term oral health.

BDS — SMS Medical College, Jaipur MDS — Pediatric Dentistry, RUHS PGCOI — Nair Dental College, Mumbai Ex-Dentist: PGI Chandigarh & Bombay Hospital
Book a Consultation →
What we offer

Our Dental Services

A full range of specialist dental services for every member of your family — all under one roof.

01

Pediatric Dentistry

Dr. Goyal's MDS in Pediatric Dentistry ensures specialist-level, anxiety-free care for children. Outdoor play area on site!

Book now
02

Teeth Whitening

Philips ZOOM! Whitespeed with visible before & after results — dramatic brightness in a single comfortable session.

Book now
03

Root Canal Treatment

Microscope-assisted RCT using a Zumax dental microscope for superior precision. Pain-free, single-visit procedure.

Book now
04

Dental Implants

PGCOI-certified implantology. Replace missing teeth with results that look, feel, and function exactly like natural teeth.

Book now
05

Orthodontics

Traditional braces and Invisalign for children and adults. Straighten your smile with a plan designed just for you.

Book now
06

Cosmetic & Smile Design

Veneers, gap closure, bonding, and complete smile makeovers. Transform your confidence with cosmetic dentistry tailored to you.

Book now
About the doctor

Dr. Pooja Goyal —
Trained at India's finest

Dr. Goyal brings a rare combination of pediatric expertise and implantology training to Jaipur. Her gentle approach and deep clinical knowledge make her the trusted choice for families across Vaishali Nagar.

BDS — Bachelor of Dental Surgery

SMS Medical College, Jaipur

MDS — Pediatric & Preventive Dentistry

Rajasthan Dental College & Hospital, RUHS

PGCOI — Post Graduate Certificate in Oral Implantology

Nair Dental College & Hospital, Mumbai

Ex-Dentist — PGI Chandigarh & Bombay Hospital, Mumbai

Advanced clinical residency training

Why choose us

Dental care you can truly trust

From children's first teeth to full-mouth rehabilitation — every patient receives specialist-led, compassionate care.

  • Specialist MDS & PGCOI qualified — not a general practitioner
  • Outdoor play area for children — slides, trampoline & more
  • Zumax microscope-assisted RCT for unmatched precision
  • Philips ZOOM! Whitespeed in-clinic teeth whitening system
  • Complimentary tea & coffee in our comfortable waiting lounge
  • Full treatment plan & costs explained before any procedure
